---
name: ✨ 功能建议 / Feature request
about: 建议一个新功能或改进 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> 提交前请确认你的想法不在 [MASTER §5 边界](https://github.com/aipo-lenshow/NDBot/blob/main/README.md) 列出的"不做"清单内.
> Before filing: confirm your idea is not on the "won't do" list (see MASTER §5 in docs).

## 想解决什么问题 / What problem does this solve

描述当前痛点, 而不是直接说"我想要 X 功能".
Describe the underlying pain — not just "I want feature X".

## 建议方案 / Proposed solution

…

## 替代方案 / Alternatives considered

例如: 用 rclone 现有功能 / 第三方插件 / cron 等.
e.g. existing rclone tricks, third-party plugins, cron, etc.

## 其他 / Additional context

参考链接 / 截图 / 类似项目实现 / Reference links, screenshots, similar implementations.
